name: KHATI Natural Grass Woven Bird Nest Bird Breeding Hatch Cage Parrot Rest Place
description: Description:Hand woven grass canery nest, which is environmentally friendly.Designed with metal hooks, easy to put up onto the side of bird cage, adding something fun.Providing a safe habitat for your lovely feathered ones to rest, courtship, breed, etc.Great decoration for home, garden, bars, cafes and so on.Size: approx.18x18x18cm /7.09x7.09x7.09inchSpecification:Material: BambooColor: as the pictures shownSize: approx.18x18x18cm /7.09x7.09x7.09inchPackage Includes:1 Piece of Canary NestNote:Due to handmade products, each one is not completely identical.Please allow slim measuring error due
